related_questions.question: What is the 10-10-10 rule for parenting?
related_questions.snippet: First 10 minutes when your children wake up, be present, the first 10 minutes after seeing them after being away (work or anywhere) be present, and then last 10 minutes before bed. It truly sets a tone! To be able to be present is a gift to parent and child.
